The '''Assault Bowcaster''' was a variant on the traditional [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Bowcaster/Legends|bowcaster]]. It was widely used in the last days of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Assault Bowcasters were used by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] and [[Wookiee regiment|Wookiee Freedom Fighters]].

{{Weapon-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed]]'' {{1st}}
